storyHook: 说出难过，获得安慰，慢慢好转

narrative.when: 周二晚上，甲一个人在家
narrative.where: 甲家客厅，乙打电话过来
narrative.who: 甲（难过的人）· 乙（关心的朋友）
narrative.how: 语气低落地说出发生的事
narrative.method: 说出难过的原因、乙耐心倾听安慰、给一些建议、心情慢慢好转
narrative.event: 甲养的小狗今天生病了，心里很难过

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am not well tonight.
turns.zh: 我今晚不太好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is wrong?
turns.zh: 怎么了？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My dog is ill. It is at the animal hospital.
turns.zh: 我的小狗病了，在宠物医院。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, that is hard news. I am sad.
turns.zh: 哦，这消息真让人难受。我很难过。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It would not take food or drink. It was ill two times.
turns.zh: 它不吃不喝，还吐了两次。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You did well to take it to the doctor.
turns.zh: 你做得对，带它去看医生了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The doctor said it has to be there for the night.
turns.zh: 医生说它得住院一晚。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have no doubt they will see to it well.
turns.zh: 我毫不怀疑他们会把它照顾得很好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I keep crying. The house is so without things.
turns.zh: 我一直在哭，房子空荡荡的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am with you. You are not on your own.
turns.zh: 我陪着你呢。你不是一个人。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I keep smelling its cover. It makes me more sad.
turns.zh: 我一直闻着它的毯子，反而更难过。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a hard thing. But you did all you could.
turns.zh: 那确实难受。但你已经尽力了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I keep thinking it is in pain. That is the worst part.
turns.zh: 我总想着它在疼，这是最难受的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The medical men will give it something for the pain.
turns.zh: 医生会给它止痛的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope so. I do not like it to be in pain.
turns.zh: 希望如此。我不想它疼。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Would you like me to come over?
turns.zh: 要不要我过去陪你？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, but thank you for asking.
turns.zh: 不用了，但谢谢你问我。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. I will come with you tomorrow.
turns.zh: 好主意。明天我陪你去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That would be good. I would not go on my own.
turns.zh: 那挺好的。我不想一个人去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then that is fixed. Now, make a cup of tea for you.
turns.zh: 那就说定了。现在，给自己泡杯茶吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. I have some tea with a flower smell.
turns.zh: 好的。我有带花香味的茶。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. While the water gets warm, put on a light picture.
turns.zh: 好。烧水的时候，放一部轻松的电影。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would not like to see a picture.
turns.zh: 我不想看电影。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then have your tea. I am here.
turns.zh: 那就喝茶吧。我在这儿。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are kind. Your voice gives me a bit of comfort.
turns.zh: 你真好。你的声音让我舒服了一点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. You are not on your own now.
turns.zh: 那很好。你现在不是一个人了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I am not so shut in.
turns.zh: 嗯。我不觉得那么闷了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the way. You are strong.
turns.zh: 这就对了。你很坚强。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am not strong. But I am a little better.
turns.zh: 我不坚强。但好了一点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One step at a time. How is the tea?
turns.zh: 一步一步来。茶怎么样？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is warm and soft. The room seems less hollow.
turns.zh: 温温的，很柔和。让房间没那么空荡荡了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. A warm drink does that. Do you have a cover?
turns.zh: 好。热饮就有这个效果。你有毯子吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. The small dog cover is here. I keep it near.
turns.zh: 有。小狗的毯子在这儿。我放在身边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It will be happy to look at you tomorrow.
turns.zh: 它明天看到你会很高兴的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take the warm cover with me.
turns.zh: 我会带上保暖的盖布。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. It will have your smell.
turns.zh: 好主意。毯子上有你的味道。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I hope it will be happy here.
turns.zh: 嗯。希望它在这里开心。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Dogs get comfort from what is dear to them.
turns.zh: 狗从熟悉的东西中得到安慰。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are right. I will put it in my bag now.
turns.zh: 你说得对。我现在就把它放进包里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. And get some rest after that. Tomorrow is a new day.
turns.zh: 好。之后好好休息。明天是新的一天。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that. Thank you for your kind words.
turns.zh: 我会的。谢谢你这么暖心的话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need for thanks. That is what friends are for.
turns.zh: 不用谢。朋友就是干这个的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am still a bit sad, but not so much now.
turns.zh: 我还是有点难过，但没刚才那么厉害了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Let the sad feeling go bit by bit.
turns.zh: 那就好。让难过一点点散掉。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will make a cup of tea and see a light picture.
turns.zh: 我打算泡杯茶，看部轻松的电影。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. A laugh will do you good.
turns.zh: 好主意。笑一笑对你有好处。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I have a short play in mind.
turns.zh: 嗯，我想到一部短的搞笑戏。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Have a laugh, then get a good rest.
turns.zh: 很好。笑一笑，然后好好休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that. You have been a great help.
turns.zh: 我会的。你帮了大忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Give me a ring if you need a talk.
turns.zh: 好的。想聊了就给我打电话。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put on the kettle now.
turns.zh: 我现在去烧水。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you have a good short play to see?
turns.zh: 你有没有好看的短剧推荐？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is about a man and his dog. Quite a laugh.
turns.zh: 这是关于一个男人和他的狗。挺逗的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That sounds right for me. I will get that one.
turns.zh: 听起来很适合我。我就看那个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Keep your mind off things for a time.
turns.zh: 好。暂时别想那些事了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I will put my box away and only see the play.
turns.zh: 嗯。我把手机放一边，专心看剧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the way. Let the story take you away.
turns.zh: 这就对了。让故事带你走。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I hope the dog in the play gets better too.
turns.zh: 希望剧里的狗也能好起来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have no doubt. It is a happy play.
turns.zh: 我毫不怀疑。那是部开心的剧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That was a good talk. I am better now.
turns.zh: 谢谢你陪我聊。我现在好多了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It was wise to get you on the line.
turns.zh: 还好我给你打了电话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am happy you did. How is your throat now?
turns.zh: 还好你打了。现在嗓子怎么样？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Better. The tea helped a bit.
turns.zh: 好点了。茶有点用。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Would you like to talk more about the dog?
turns.zh: 那就好。你还想聊聊小狗的事吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not now. I will watch the play.
turns.zh: 现在不想。我要看剧了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. Let your mind rest.
turns.zh: 好主意。让脑子歇一歇。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Will you be up late? I may send a word after.
turns.zh: 你会熬夜吗？我晚点可能发个消息。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, I will go to bed early. But you can send a word in the morning.
turns.zh: 不，我会早睡。但你早上可以发个消息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will say how the dog is.
turns.zh: 好。我会告诉你小狗的情况。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. You are a good friend.
turns.zh: 谢谢你。你是个好朋友。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good time to get my word.
turns.zh: 你打来真好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. What are friends for?
turns.zh: 当然啦。朋友是做什么的？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The house is so quiet without him.
turns.zh: 没他在，房子空荡荡的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see. He is with a good doctor now.
turns.zh: 我知道。他现在由好医生照顾。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I keep turning over if he is in fear.
turns.zh: 我老想着他会不会害怕。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Dogs are strong. He will be all right.
turns.zh: 狗很坚强。他会没事的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do you say so?
turns.zh: 你真这么想？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. And you did the right thing taking him in.
turns.zh: 是的。你及时送他去是对的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope the doctor will let me see him tomorrow.
turns.zh: 希望医生明天让我看他。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will come with you if you like.
turns.zh: 如果你愿意，我陪你去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Would you? That would be good.
turns.zh: 真的吗？那太好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. What time is good for you?
turns.zh: 好的。你什么时间方便？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: After the first meal, about nine?
turns.zh: 吃完第一餐，九点左右？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is all right. I will be at your door.
turns.zh: 没问题。我到你家门口接你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are a true friend. Thank you.
turns.zh: 你真是好朋友。谢谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need for thanks. That is what friends do.
turns.zh: 不用谢。朋友就该这样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I still have a knot in my stomach.
turns.zh: 我心里还是堵得慌。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is normal. But you are not on your own now.
turns.zh: 正常。但你现在不是一个人了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep my mind on other things.
turns.zh: 我试着想点别的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. How about a cup of tea?
turns.zh: 好主意。来杯茶怎么样？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get the kettle on.
turns.zh: 我去烧水。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Do you have any tea?
turns.zh: 好。你有茶叶吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, we have some flower tea.
turns.zh: 有，我们有花茶。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That sounds soft and warm.
turns.zh: 听起来又香又暖。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is. I will make two cups.
turns.zh: 是的。我泡两杯。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like that. Take your time.
turns.zh: 那太好了。不着急。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The water is boiling now.
turns.zh: 水开了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. The smell will do you good.
turns.zh: 好。闻闻味道对你有好处。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is your cup. Mind, it is warm.
turns.zh: 你的茶。小心烫。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I am a bit better now.
turns.zh: 那很好。我现在好一点了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am happy you are feeling a bit better.
turns.zh: 很高兴你好一点了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, talking to you is a great help.
turns.zh: 嗯，跟你说话好多了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We will go see the dog tomorrow.
turns.zh: 我们明天去看小狗。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is that right you have time?
turns.zh: 你确定有时间吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will make time. It is no trouble.
turns.zh: 我会腾出时间。不麻烦。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is very kind of you.
turns.zh: 你真好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Get some sleep tonight.
turns.zh: 今晚睡一会儿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. I am tired now.
turns.zh: 我会的。我现在累了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will ring you in the morning.
turns.zh: 好的。我早上打给你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. Good night.
turns.zh: 谢谢你。晚安。

storyBlurb: 小狗生病了，甲独自在家难过。乙打来电话，耐心倾听安慰，甲心情慢慢好转。
storyScript:
【开场·情绪低落】周二晚上，客厅的灯光昏黄，甲蜷缩在沙发里，怀里抱着小狗的毯子。小狗今天突然不吃不喝，还吐了两次，甲带它去了宠物医院，医生说需要住院观察。回到家，空荡荡的房间里只剩下时钟的滴答声。甲把脸埋进毯子里，闻到小狗熟悉的气味，眼泪就止不住地往下掉。心里像压了一块石头，喘不过气来。

【进行·倾听安慰】手机突然震动，是乙打来的电话。甲犹豫了一下，还是接起来，声音带着哭腔。乙立刻听出不对劲，轻声问怎么了。甲断断续续地说出小狗生病的事，乙没有打断，只是安静地听着。等甲说完，乙才温柔地说：我知道你很难过，小狗对你来说就像家人一样。乙没有说太多大道理，只是说：你做得已经很好了，及时带它去医院，现在它正在接受治疗。甲听着乙的声音，觉得心里没那么堵了。

【进行·陪伴建议】乙提议：要不要我过去陪你？甲摇摇头说不用，但心里暖暖的。乙又说：明天我陪你去医院看它吧。甲犹豫了一下，答应了。乙接着建议：今晚别想太多，给自己泡杯热茶，看部轻松的电影。甲走到厨房，烧了壶水，泡了一杯茉莉花茶。茶香袅袅升起，甲轻轻啜了一口，温热的感觉从喉咙滑到胃里。乙又说了些自己以前养宠物的趣事，甲听着听着，嘴角微微上扬。

【收束·稍感好转】挂掉电话后，甲坐在沙发上，手里捧着茶杯。虽然心里还是担心小狗，但不再那么绝望了。窗外的夜色很安静，甲想起乙说的话：明天会是新的一天。甲深呼吸了一下，把小狗的毯子叠好放在一旁，决定早点休息。心里那块石头似乎轻了一些，甲闭上眼睛，慢慢沉入梦乡。
